overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character walking through a foggy rural field toward a traditional wooden farmstead with thatched-roof buildings. The scene features grazing sheep, wooden fences, and a misty morning atmosphere with cinematic game graphics.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grazing pasture with distant forest boundary

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward the distant farm buildings while holding a rifle

notable_agents.action: sheep grazing peacefully in the tall grass near the fence line

entered.detail: large wooden barn with steep thatched roof and exposed timber beams
rustic wooden post fence running along the field boundary
dense tree line forming the horizon boundary of the field
old wooden wagon or cart positioned near the barn entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a foggy open field with tall grass, approaching a distant thatched-roof barn. A wooden fence lines the left side while sheep graze nearby, and the forest tree line is visible in the hazy distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: farmstead courtyard with traditional wooden buildings

events.description: stone wall becomes visible on the left foreground as the character approaches the farmstead

agents.ego_description: continuing to approach the main barn, moving closer to the farm buildings and grazing sheep

notable_agents.action: sheep grazing near the barn entrance and wooden cart

entered.detail: low stone wall or rock pile on the left side of the approach path
smaller wooden building with dark roof visible behind the main thatched barn

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the farmstead closely, with the thatched-roof barn now dominating the right side of the frame. A stone wall appears in the left foreground, and a secondary building becomes visible behind the main barn. The wooden cart and grazing sheep are now clearly visible near the barn entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty rural field that gradually closes in on a traditional thatched-roof farmstead. It begins with the character walking through tall grass and dense fog, passing a wooden fence and grazing sheep while a distant barn emerges from the haze. As the camera advances, the open field gives way to the immediate surroundings of the farm, where the thatched-roof barn begins to dominate the right side of the frame. The scene then shifts to reveal a stone wall in the left foreground and a secondary building tucked behind the main structure. Finally, the view settles on the barn entrance, bringing the wooden cart and nearby sheep into clear focus.
